objective: Implement and verify ctxindex V1 as the local personal-context gateway defined by `v1-context-access-layer`: typed definitions, trusted Extension loading, fresh generic storage, exact Realms, Gmail discovery/retrieval, threads, Artifacts/exports, reversible provider email Draft Actions, local-directory support, an external tenders proof, generated docs, and complete validation.
completionNote: All 55 tasks, mandatory Slice gates, final CI/integration/e2e/D3/strict validation, isolated workflow, fresh-context QA, semantic OpenSpec verification, capability-spec sync, drift/cartography maintenance, and approved human Gmail checkpoints passed. Change remains active and unarchived for explicit archive.

criteriaSnapshot.title: Public definitions and registries drive the runtime

status.note: evidence: `work/slice-1-gate.txt` (typecheck, lint, 181 passing tests, and compiled-extension regression passed); final verification: `work/final-v1-gate.txt`

criteriaSnapshot.title: Compiled ctxindex loads trusted external TypeScript Extensions

status.note: evidence: `work/slice-2-gate.txt` (explicit-path loading, atomic rejection, D3 relocation, Source preservation/recovery, typecheck, lint, and 190 tests passed); final verification: `work/final-v1-gate.txt`

criteriaSnapshot.title: Fresh generic storage enforces exact Realm and Source semantics

status.note: evidence: `work/slice-3-gate.txt` (fresh generic schema and prototype rejection, 51 focused storage tests, 198 passing full-suite tests with one skip, 10 integration tests, typecheck, lint, strict OpenSpec validation, and diff check passed); final verification: `work/final-v1-gate.txt`

criteriaSnapshot.title: Gmail discovery and retrieval use the generic contract

status.note: evidence: `work/slice-4-gate.txt` (mocked Gmail binary search/get/cache proof and the approved isolated read-only live Gmail search/get checkpoint passed); final verification: `work/final-v1-gate.txt`

evidence: `work/slice-5-gate.txt` (Relation/thread unit and binary-CLI out-of-order traversal, cross-Source joins, no provider I/O, typecheck, lint, full tests, and D3 passed); final verification: `work/final-v1-gate.txt`

criteriaSnapshot.title: Artifacts and exports are managed and observable

status.note: evidence: `work/slice-6-gate.txt` (Artifact CAS/download/cache/copy, exact retention purge and re-download, disk accounting, deterministic JSON/Profile EML export, 107 focused and 419 full-suite tests, typecheck, lint, strict OpenSpec, D3, and diff checks passed); final verification: `work/final-v1-gate.txt`

criteriaSnapshot.title: Gmail Draft Actions are typed, reversible, and cannot send

status.note: evidence: `work/slice-7-mocked-gate.txt` and `work/slice-7-live-draft.txt` (typed reversible Action contracts, zero-I/O invalid/no-send proofs, mocked binary create/update, and approved live stable-Ref Draft create/update with provider UI confirmation passed); final verification: `work/final-v1-gate.txt`

criteriaSnapshot.title: Local directories use the same generic Resource path

status.note: evidence: `work/slice-8-gate.txt` (generic local-directory sync/search/get, stable Refs and tombstones, ignored/binary/oversize warnings, zero egress, fresh schema boundaries, D3, typecheck, lint, 592 passing full-suite tests with one live skip, strict OpenSpec, and diff checks passed); final verification: `work/final-v1-gate.txt`

criteriaSnapshot.title: An external tenders Extension proves the public seam

status.note: evidence: `work/slice-9-gate.txt` (public-SDK-only external tenders definitions, explicit-path loading, relocated compiled-binary init/sync/search/get/removal/degraded reads/recovery, registry-derived availability, D3, typecheck, lint, 598 passing full-suite tests with one live skip, strict OpenSpec, and diff checks passed); final verification: `work/final-v1-gate.txt`

criteriaSnapshot.title: User and agent interfaces derive from loaded registries

status.note: evidence: `work/slice-10-interface-gate.txt` (registry-generated CLI/agent interfaces, collision-safe Source configuration, embedded relocated-binary skills, non-interactive input, focused and full tests, typecheck, lint, diff checking, and independent review passed); final verification: `work/final-v1-gate.txt`

criteriaSnapshot.title: Complete V1 behavior is verified end to end

status.note: evidence: `work/final-v1-gate.txt`, `work/final-runtime-qa.txt`, and `work/task-10.5-openspec-verify.txt` (all Slice gates, complete isolated workflow, SPEC exits, fresh-context QA, strict final commands, semantic verification, drift/cartography checks, and both approved live Gmail checkpoints passed; the change remains unarchived)
